narrative:
Berlin Twp township has 2,381 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
